---
title: "Starter Notebook"
author: "Alule Robert"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Overview

This is a starter R Markdown notebook. Replace this content with your
documented analysis.

## Load Libraries

```{r libraries}
# library(tidyverse)  # Uncomment when needed
# library(ggplot2)
```

## Analysis

Add your analysis code here.

```{r analysis}
# Example: print a summary
message("Notebook loaded successfully.")
```
